# WS-Security Test Fixtures

Reference SOAP envelopes used in `tests/main/wsse-engine.test.ts`. Reference
certificates are reused from `tests/fixtures/certs/` (server/client/CA/self-signed
keypairs generated by `tests/fixtures/certs/generate.sh`).

## Files

- `sample-envelope.xml` — minimal SOAP 1.1 envelope used as input for sign/encrypt
  scenarios. Contains an `<soap:Header/>` placeholder and a `tns:Echo` body.

Additional fixtures (signed-body.xml, signed-multi.xml, encrypted-body.xml,
username-digest.xml, tampered.xml) are produced at test runtime by `applyWsSecurity`
and asserted directly — pre-generated copies are not checked in to keep the suite
deterministic against new openssl/xml-crypto versions.

**Important:** these certs and payloads are for local testing only. Never commit
production WSSE artifacts to source control.
